arts.ttl: U’s have plan as due date for Tyler Goodrham’s partner is Millwall game
arts.sum: OXFORD United have a plan in place should Tyler Goodrham get the call that his partner is going into labour this weekend.
Jamie Griffith has provided a score prediction for all 12 matches taking place in the Championship this weekend.

arts.ttl: Preview: Oxford United vs. Millwall - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Oxford United and Millwall, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Highly unusual situation for Millwall head coach after power failure scuppers Portsmouth fixture
arts.sum: Millwall head coach Neil Harris was placed in the unusual scenario of beginning to prepare for Saturday’s Championship fixture at Oxford United at the time when his side should have been in action against Portsmouth. “We thank Portsmouth for allowing us to do it – a lot of clubs wouldn’t,” Harris told Millwall TV .
